gist.headline: A note-worthy addition
gist.blurb: Meet Noted, a new community app for organizing markdown notes, to-dos, and expenses. It uses our built-in AI to generate images and text right inside your notes.
gist.summary: Added 'Noted', a community-built markdown note-taking app with integrated AI generation, to the app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Noted in the app directory to organize tasks and enrich their notes with AI-generated content.
gist.visual_concept: A note-taking and productivity theme. Polly the bee organizing notes or writing in a journal. A glowing digital notebook or to-do list. Cozy study/desk vibes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, writing in a glowing digital notebook with a pixelated quill. A chunky retro monitor in the background displays a markdown to-do list. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, writing in a glowing digital notebook with a pixelated quill. A chunky retro monitor in the background displays a markdown to-do list. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
